sidebar.noPoints: Tap the canvas to place points

confirm.releaseConstraintDesc: This will release the constraint on this segment.

page1.title: Tap the canvas to place points
page1.body: Click or tap the canvas to add points. Points connect in sequence to form the wire EDM machining path.

page2.title: Edit coordinates directly
page2.body: Enter X and Y values directly in the sidebar list. Long-press (press and hold) a point to open a dialog for editing coordinates or deleting the point.

page3.title: Ortho mode and constraints
page3.body: Turn on Ortho mode to automatically create right-angle paths. Right-angle segments are kept as constrained and can be released from the long-press menu.

page4.title: Snap, grid, and history
page4.body: Enable Snap to attract points to existing ones. Show the grid for coordinate reference. Paths are auto-saved and can be reloaded from the History panel.

page5.title: Simulation and keyboard shortcuts
page5.body:
Click Simulate to preview the machining path.
Ctrl + Z to undo, Ctrl + Y to redo.
